description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise lounge, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The sofa features five main seat cushions and seven loose back cushions, all of which are plush and generously filled for comfort. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the clean lines of the overall design. The legs are short, minimally visible, and likely made of metal or plastic, providing subtle elevation above the ground. The backrest is straight and continuous, supporting the arrangement of loose cushions for a relaxed appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish, giving the sofa a contemporary and inviting look suitable for urban environments.
description: A large, light beige sectional sofa with a left-facing chaise, plush loose cushions, and straight padded armrests. The design is modern, with a smooth, matte fabric and minimal, short legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sofa, the left-facing chaise, and the arrangement of seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the thickness of the seat and back cushions, with the armrest visible at the near end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous straight backrest and the subtle elevation from the short legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the right armrest, the length of the main seating area, and the end of the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Five individual seat cushions and seven loose back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged in a sectional layout with the chaise on the left.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests with padding, matching the sofa's height and featuring a clean, boxy profile with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, minimally visible legs positioned at the corners and possibly central points, likely made of metal or plastic, with a simple, block-like style.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest of medium height, supporting loose, uniform back cushions with no visible tufting or channeling.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
